item.title: Canada wants the Muskrat to be removed
item.dc:creator: Che07

item.title: Thank you Imgur for the push !
item.description:
1st part : https://imgur.com/gallery/NX1RMCS There it is! Today I was finally able to prove the truth to everyone A judge just ruled that not only everything that customer said about me were lies, but that she did it out of obsession with me that she made me lose my job as a bartender because she couldn't accept that I rejected her She went "If I can't have you, nobody will", and tbh it's extremely scary to see how many were totally okay with that.
That's the ruling from the judge + PPO Now that whole thing is forever behind me. I owe a lot to you Imgur, you guys are the ones who pushed me to go to court. So thank you ^^ sincerely. All proofs (phone records and testimonies)are public on the files of the Superior Court of Quebec (#500-17-132674-253). If any of y'all want the details of the case (and can speak French). I'm gonna go have a pint now, Cheers!
item.dc:creator: louloucacapoo

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1283 (terrestrial stage)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
They're probably not but I like the cut of their jib.
Bones and skulls, especially fossil ones, always good for me.
Yeah, who the fuck puts a Forge like that in their basement? That's stupid, the Carbon monoxide is gonna kill you fast.
I'd watch this movie.
It's mead racking day! Yay.
Poor racist Wood Thrush.
Musk is the Demiurge, Frump is the antichrist. I'm kidding... or am I?
Pueblo cliff dwelling, Colorado.
The oldest Cool S dates back to the 1890s
@racheKatze is this the one you were looking for?
Pippin tax. Today's message from Pippin: "Peek-a-boo Pippin! Pickle pickle pickle? What the fuck." ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself.

item.title: REPORT: Democrat for Florida, Maxwell Frost, kicked out of oversight hearing for calling Musk and Trump "grifters".
item.description:
Reddit link has the video of the event. https://www.reddit.com/r/PublicFreakout/comments/1iy4y65/rep_maxwell_frost_kicked_out_from_an_oversight/ A comment in the thread mentioned the following and inspired me to share this: "Just left his office a message thanking him for being the backbone we need, and I’m 8 states away. Aide said she’ll knows he’ll appreciate the kind words. Throw Rep Frost’s office some love." Link: https://www.congress.gov/member/maxwell-frost/F000476
https://www.snopes.com/fact-check/theodore-roosevelt-on-criticizing-the-president/ Can a necromancer bring this man back and get him in office again?

item.title: If you're having a bad day, here's an assortment wholesome dump to make you smile : )
item.description:
1. That's how you have fun
2. Chunky boyyy
3. Doggos acting like drunk buddies at a bar
4. Piggy getting combed
5. Bunny making its bunny bed
6. Them eyebrows
7
8
9. This game looks fun
10. Getting a shower
11. Cow zoomies
12. Horsie zoomies
13. Here we have a tree logging machine having breakfeast in its natural habitat
14. Otter having its temperature taken : )
15 Thank you if you made this far in the dump! Let me share with you that as well as posting on Imgur, I'm also working on a game of my own. A passion project, if you will. It's a "Stanley Parable" inspired first person narrative game. If you like the vibe of this dump, you might actually like the game to (at least what my friend on Discord tells me, that one friend). Anyway please wishlist it helps small game devs like me: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_Or_Youll_Delete_The_Multiverse/ P.S. Have a great week!!

item.dc:creator: danat101

item.title: Here I am making my chicken with stewed sweet peppers!
item.description: https://www.triedandtruerecipe.com/crispy-chicken-with-stewed-sweet-peppers/ 2 pounds bone-in, skin-on chicken thighs (about 6 to 8 thighs) 2 teaspoons kosher salt (plus more to taste) 1 teaspoon black pepper (plus more to taste) 1 tablespoon extra virgin olive oil 2 leeks (white and light green parts only; halved lengthwise, thoroughly rinsed, and thinly sliced into half-moons) 6 cloves garlic (peeled and minced) 1 pound mini sweet peppers (trimmed, seeded, and sliced into rounds) 2 tablespoons sweet paprika 1½ teaspoons smoked paprika ½ teaspoon cayenne powder (optional) 2 tablespoons flour 2 cups chicken stock 14.5- ounce can crushed tomatoes 1 teaspoon granulated sugar (plus more to taste) For serving: 1 tablespoon parsley (minced) 1 lemon (quartered) Cooked egg noodles, white rice, or pearl couscous Brown the chicken: Preheat the oven to 425ºF. Pat the chicken dry and season all over with 2 teaspoons kosher salt and 1 teaspoon black pepper. Set aside. In an oven-proof wide skillet or braising pot, heat 1 tablespoon of extra virgin olive oil over medium-high heat until very hot. Add the chicken, skin-side down and cook for 5 minutes until well-browned and crispy. Flip and cook for 2 to 3 minutes more. Transfer the chicken to a plate and drain off all but 1 tablespoon of chicken fat from the pot. Return the skillet to medium heat. Sauté the aromatics: Add the leeks and the peppers to the skillet and cook, stirring often, for 5 to 6 minutes or they soften. Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant. Reduce the heat to medium-low. Sprinkle 2 tablespoons sweet paprika, 1½ teaspoons smoked paprika, and ½ teaspoon cayenne powder over the vegetables and toss to coat. Prepare the sauce: Sprinkle the flour over the vegetables and stir to coat. If the pot seems dry, add a teaspoon or two of the reserved chicken fat. Cook for 1 minute until the paprika begins to deepen in color, being careful not to burn the spices. Slowly stir in the chicken stock until completely smooth. Bring to a boil and add the crushed tomatoes. Turn off the heat. Add 1 teaspoon of sugar. Taste and season with salt and pepper. Roast the chicken: Nestle the chicken into the sauce. Transfer to the oven and roast for 25 to 30 minutes or until an instant-read thermometer reaches 165ºF when inserted into the deepest part of the thigh. Remove from the oven. To serve: Scatter minced parsley over the chicken. Serve with cooked pearl couscous, rice, or egg noodles and a lemon wedge. Enjoy!
item.dc:creator: triedandtruerecipes

item.title: The Owl
item.description:
These are the 7 species of owl found in southeast Wisconsin: Snowy Owl, Great Horned Owl, Barred Owl, Short-eared Owl, Long-eared Owl, Screech Owl, and the Saw-whet Owl.
Here's how to prevent rodent visitors without ecosystem-destructive poisons: https://intobirds.com/ditch-the-rat-poison-use-prevention/
item.dc:creator: theshopliftingseagull

item.title: FETCH!
item.description:
Lola and her favorite ball, my god I love her
She literally plays fetch with these, and I can't seem to find anymore!! Edit: For anyone wondering, it's a pompom off a blanket. It's dense enough that no strings will get loose enough to harm her. I was looking for cloth-like balls since she likes grabbing them with her claws, but all I can find are the plastic ones :(

item.dc:creator: LeonSpinks

item.title: A BIG scam company just stole my whole game from steam, ripped it and sold it as their own on Playstation and other consoles.
item.description: Hey guys, I posted this on GameDev here :https://www.reddit.com/r/gamedev/comments/1ix993g/a_big_scam_company_just_stole_my_whole_game_from/ - and wanted to bring it to more attention to hopefully get more people aware about a company that is NOT only stealing games, but also stealing money from honest buyers. They stole my game, uploaded it on consoles and sold it as theirs. They are doing this with multiple companies and I wish more people are aware of this. So recently I have released The Backrooms 1998 on Playstation, Xbox, Steam and Nintendo switch. I was pretty happy with myself and all that, you know? Been in development for quite a while and being a solo developer and having my game finally on consoles is always awesome to see haha. I even posted about it here on Imgur. Link to my game for context: https://store.steampowered.com/app/1985930/The_Backrooms_1998__Found_Footage_Survival_Horror_Game/ Anyway .. Someone commented on one of my videos and violently (big thanks to him!) asked me why am I releasing the same game with it's name changed on consoles and I got a little bit confused. I explained that this game was never on consoles before and I have just released it now and they provided a link to a video - and behold ... long story short this company called "COOL DEVS S.R.L" stole my whole game, ripped it, pasted some bad AI crap on it as a cover, literally made a BAD version of it and just published it on consoles and sold it to trick players into buying it. They stole the whole game as it is alongside the music, sounds, voice lines and everything else. They only changed the monster and the picture on the frame.. Video Link to the fake game: https://youtu.be/QdQ6qtcSIFc?t=383 Video Link to my game: https://youtu.be/7tWYhFfXNBM?t=561 Also, this is a link to their Nintendo Page so you can see what kind of "games" they do: https://www.nintendo.com/us/search/#cat=gme&f=softwarePublisher&softwarePublisher=COOL%20DEVS I done further research and it seems they have also a couple of posts and are known in the PS5 community. One mentioned is the company that actually approached me. I think they are all basically the same one. I still can't believe that someone as big as Sony, Xbox and Nintendo are letting this slide. It's sad. The funny thing is I saw this game before on the store and I LITERALLY spoke about how these scam devs are mostly stealing popular games on steam and uploading them consoles .. and I had no idea it was one of my own game that they stole. I do not understand how consoles platforms allow these type of scams going on and rub it under the carpet. This is hurtful to smaller indie developers, and hurtful to players that gets scammed by buying these games thinking they are real games. Also, they are doing this with other games. We have already working on finding out more info about them, and submitted a DMCA request to remove the game off the stores, right now it's down from PlayStation and Xbox but still up on the Nintendo store unfortunately. Hopefully they will also remove it soon as well. Another important detail that may have ties or not: I got contacted last year by a VERY sketchy publisher wanting to publish my game on consoles. I declined. They were sketchy and after checking their games they had very similar games to this fake company. They are both registered in S.R.L and they got banned from consoles recently. Could this be the same guys? Stole the game right after I refused to publish it with them. Not sure, but hopefully we can find out.
item.dc:creator: Mech891

item.dc:creator: RobbieRodriguez

item.title: Potato's Daily Dirties
item.description:
Trying to do more daily dirty posts dis week to catch up on my over 3k memes I have piled up to share. enjoy! To be clear considering comments on yesterday's posts the memes I post are ones I downloaded for myself and a few select people in my life. I am in no way encouraging poor behaviors of random people on the internet and also what two or more consenting adults do is their own business. Don't yuck someone else's yum. If you don't like what I post you are more then welcome to swipe right or block me. I do not appreciate comments and messages judging me for my taste in memes. So I will block anyone that chooses to do these things. Also to my downvote fairy. It's been over a year now of you coming around downvoting all of the comments. Don't you have something better to do with your time then downvote people having fun on the internet? What a sad life you must lead.
over 3000 memes staring at me from my phone storage waiting to be posted...
neither. because i am not overexplaining when communicating to be understood and heard. I am allowed to express myself and not be made to feel bad about it or judged.
hehehe I love seeing my memes that I stole from imgur getting reposted. its the meme circle of life.
dis us in all of the video games.
getting sucked into video games is one of the few things I can really focus on. and well. that one other thing. that will always distract me. deliciously so.
these fingers are made for gaming and meme collecting!
I have found a really good weekly routine that allows space for me to get my daily/weekly chores done and also allow space for relaxation and gaming fun. and memes. and discord things. and commute calls. :p
me if I was a cow.
I do hate tomato.
I am really glad I have people who accept me for me and love me for me and allow me the space to just be *me*
uwu.
om.
going on a trip at end of month where will be outside in warm things and sunshine for a boat trip part. itll be weird. and also bringing along tons of sunscreen so I can maintain my wonderful pale self. and wot not.
lol so glad to be out of that toxicity they placed on me constantly with this and then throwing a temper tantrum anyway instead of being an adult and clarifying instead of jumping to conclusions.
mhmm. healing takes time and finally through to and able to enjoy things once again. I love that now my days are filled with joy and amazing people.
I dont care if it rains a ton. we could just do the playing in rain instead of seeing the things...
hmm. those are alomst the right times and also due to foreseeable circumstances i am no longer falling apart so good conversations to be had.
om. ironically when I am depressy I dont share memes. so think its proportional to when i am not depressed I shitpost a lot
big.
The above image was made by the wonderful @PyroDragon! They have their own channel in the Deviousness discord where they share links to their dumps and be an all around dragony dragon! I has a Deviousness discord server! We had a super successful little secret santa! Thank you to everyone who participated. I learned a lot and look forward to doing it next year! We have a bunch of areas including a SFW area, content creator area, a NSFW area and more! We have gaming fun! We have spontaneous gaming and some ping roles for people to use to get groups together based on US and EU time zones! We have scheduled gaming that the wonderful @PyroDragon (who is a Silly Dragony Dragon) is running on Saturdays! *It'll be the Jackbox or Jackbox-type games that downloading them isn't necessary. All that is needed to participate is Discord, access to a web browser and semi-reliable Internet connection!* So feel free to wander in and say haii! Thank you to everyone who has joined and made it such a unique and special place! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
artist of work above (aside from my signing potato on it): https://florahv.artstation.com/projects/XnL8P3 Thanks to everyone who continues to follow my posts even when I disappear randomly for a bit. I am going to keep making dis series for a bit. This is how many memes I sort through to pick the deviousness ones out. Feel free to hit the follow button as I wont be doing a ping list for this series. Deviousness posts will now be on fridays and will contain the sorted memes still. "You need only claim the events of your life to make yourself yours." -Florida Scott-Maxwell I has a post with links to all my past posts. enjoy: https://imgur.com/a/ZDA2CBe
item.dc:creator: PotatoCheesMonk
